category.scope_note: Industrial electric motor comparison focused on Saudi Arabia market access and SASO/SEEC minimum energy performance requirements.

title.en: China-to-Saudi Arabia Industrial Motor Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国工业电动机进入沙特阿拉伯：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國工業電動機進入沙特阿拉伯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China industrial electric motor documentation against Saudi Arabia SASO/SEEC energy efficiency regulation (IE3 mandatory), SABER conformity assessment, safety, and EMC requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国工业电动机文件与沙特阿拉伯 SASO/SEEC 能效法规（IE3 强制）、SABER 符合性评定、安全及 EMC 要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國工業電動機文件與沙特阿拉伯 SASO/SEEC 能效法規（IE3 強制）、SABER 符合性評定、安全及 EMC 要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SASO conformity assessment, customs determination, energy-efficiency approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current Saudi SASO, SEEC, SABER, customs, and national market-surveillance requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SASO 合格评定、海关裁定、能效批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或投放市场前应与合格专业人士核验现行沙特 SASO、SEEC、SABER、海关及市场监管要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SASO 合格評定、海關裁定、能效批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或投放市場前應與合格專業人士核驗現行沙特 SASO、SEEC、SABER、海關及市場監管要求。

answer_first.en: Saudi Arabia requires IE3 minimum efficiency (SASO/SEEC regulation referencing IEC 60034-30-1) and SABER PCoC+SCoC market-access conformity certificates; most Chinese motors meet the IE3 efficiency floor but must obtain SABER certificates and verify IEC test-method alignment before shipment.
answer_first.zh: 沙特阿拉伯要求最低 IE3 能效（SASO/SEEC 法规参照 IEC 60034-30-1）及 SABER PCoC+SCoC 市场准入合格证书；大多数中国电机满足 IE3 能效底线，但须在出货前取得 SABER 证书并核验 IEC 测试方法的一致性。
answer_first.zht: 沙特阿拉伯要求最低 IE3 能效（SASO/SEEC 法規參照 IEC 60034-30-1）及 SABER PCoC+SCoC 市場准入合格證書；大多數中國電機滿足 IE3 能效底線，但須在出貨前取得 SABER 證書並核驗 IEC 測試方法的一致性。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, customs, market-surveillance, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.

q.en: Is IE3 efficiency mandatory for industrial motors entering Saudi Arabia?
q.zh: 进入沙特阿拉伯的工业电机是否强制要求IE3效率？
q.zht: 進入沙特阿拉伯的工業電機是否強制要求IE3效率？

a.en: Yes. SASO and the Saudi Energy Efficiency Centre (SEEC) mandate IE3 minimum efficiency under IEC 60034-30-1 for covered motor ranges. Products must obtain SABER Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) and Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) before customs clearance.
a.zh: 是的。SASO和沙特能源效率中心（SEEC）依据IEC 60034-30-1对覆盖范围内的电机强制要求IE3最低效率。产品须在清关前取得SABER产品合格证书（PCoC）和装运合格证书（SCoC）。
a.zht: 是的。SASO和沙特能源效率中心（SEEC）依據IEC 60034-30-1對覆蓋範圍內的電機強制要求IE3最低效率。產品須在清關前取得SABER產品合格證書（PCoC）和裝運合格證書（SCoC）。

q.en: What is the SABER system and why does it matter for Chinese motor exporters?
q.zh: SABER系统是什么，为何对中国电机出口商重要？
q.zht: SABER系統是什麼，為何對中國電機出口商重要？

a.en: SABER is Saudi Arabia's online conformity assessment platform managed by SASO. Every regulated product shipment requires a SABER Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) linked to an approved technical file, and a Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) for each consignment. Without both certificates, goods will not clear Saudi customs.
a.zh: SABER是由SASO管理的沙特阿拉伯线上合格评定平台。每批受监管产品须取得与已批准技术文件关联的SABER产品合格证书（PCoC）及每批货物的装运合格证书（SCoC）。缺少任一证书，货物将无法通过沙特海关。
a.zht: SABER是由SASO管理的沙特阿拉伯線上合格評定平台。每批受監管產品須取得與已批准技術文件關聯的SABER產品合格證書（PCoC）及每批貨物的裝運合格證書（SCoC）。缺少任一證書，貨物將無法通過沙特海關。
